description: Synthetic retrieval cases for safety and trust regressions.

tasks.assertion_note: Sensitive path-pattern files must be omitted by the index and must not appear in retrieved_paths.
The query intentionally matches content added after indexing; eval must surface a stale snapshot signal.

tasks.diff:
diff --git a/src/pkg/legacy_widget.py b/src/pkg/current_widget.py
similarity index 80%
rename from src/pkg/legacy_widget.py
rename to src/pkg/current_widget.py
--- a/src/pkg/legacy_widget.py
+++ b/src/pkg/current_widget.py
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-class LegacyWidget:
+class CurrentWidget:
     pass

expected_misses.reason: Current lexical impact baseline does not resolve renamed destination paths that were absent from the index.

tasks.assertion_note: This records the known lexical baseline miss so a future rename-aware retriever produces a measurable delta.
